commands.review_summary:
The PR adds `agents.list[].experimental.localModelLean` with schema/docs/test coverage and applies lean tool filtering per resolved agent across normal and compacted tool surfaces.

Reproducibility: yes. for the PR-introduced blockers: source inspection shows the branch removes arguments and callbacks that current-main code and focused tests depend on. I did not run tests because this was a read-only checkout review.
commands.review_followup: The PR needs contributor branch repair plus new real behavior proof for the added config key; this is not a safe automated repair lane while the proof gate is still unmet.

target.title: feat(agents): support per-agent local model lean mode
target.body:
## Summary

- Add `agents.list[].experimental.localModelLean` so lean local-model mode can be enabled or disabled per configured agent.
- Resolve lean mode from the explicit agent, agent-scoped session key, or configured default agent, then trim `browser`, `cron`, and `message` from normal, bundled, and catalog-compacted tool surfaces.
- Update schema/help/labels/docs and add coverage for global inheritance, per-agent opt-out, default-agent resolution, and legacy session keys.

## Verification

Behavior addressed: Per-agent local-model lean mode can now be configured for one agent, such as an LM Studio/Gemma test agent, without changing the main agent.

Real environment tested: Local gateway configuration on this machine and Discord `lm-studio-test` via Looper; LM Studio Gemma agent route remained configured for that channel.

Exact steps or command run after this patch:
- `pnpm docs:list`
- `pnpm test src/agents/local-model-lean.test.ts src/agents/pi-tools.model-provider-collision.test.ts src/agents/pi-tools-agent-config.test.ts src/agents/agent-scope.test.ts src/config/config.schema-regressions.test.ts -- --reporter=verbose`
- `pnpm build`
- `node dist/index.js config validate --json | jq '{valid,path}'`
- `pnpm check:changed`
- Looper probe to Discord `lm-studio-test` channel using the local LM Studio/Gemma route.

Evidence after fix: Focused tests passed across 5 files; build passed; local config validation returned `valid: true`; `pnpm check:changed` passed typecheck, lint, and import-cycle checks. The Discord probe message `1506219141395386389` produced LM Studio run `4e6a9566-7cdf-4598-88bb-d91a7809ca92`; the trajectory tool list omitted `browser`, `cron`, and `message`, and the model completed with `pong`.

Observed result after fix: Per-agent lean mode filters the heavyweight tools for explicit agents, default agents, and agent session keys, while per-agent `false` still opts out of inherited global lean mode.

What was not tested: I did not leave `agents.list[].experimental.localModelLean` enabled in the installed local config because older installed external plugin hosts reject the new schema until this change is released/installed there. The live Discord route used the existing per-agent `tools.deny` equivalent for compatibility; the new key is covered by schema/unit/integration tests in this patch.

Autoreview note: Codex autoreview found two P2 fallback-agent issues; both were fixed with tests. A final `codex review --uncommitted` attempt was stopped because review mode recursively launched nested autoreview commands instead of producing a final clean report.
target.author: dutifulbob
